hygiene_rule: HELD-OUT EVAL SET. These queries must NOT be used during chunking parameter tuning, prompt iteration, or any other dev-time decision. Iterate against scratch queries; only run these via eval/retrieval.py. Inflating P@5 by tuning on the eval set is the single most common eval failure — don't be that engineer.

queries.text: Who are the parties to the agreement?
queries.notes: Should retrieve a chunk listing the named parties, typically on page 1.

queries.text: What is the effective date of the title transfer?
queries.notes: Date may appear in multiple docs; relevant chunks should mention 'effective date' or 'as of'.

queries.text: List all monetary amounts and their context.
queries.notes: Should surface currency-bearing chunks with surrounding sentence context.

queries.text: Are there any outstanding obligations on the property?
What notice was served and when?
queries.notes: Handwriting source — tests retrieval over TrOCR-extracted text.
Sequence of ownership transfers; chunks may span pages.
Cross-document retrieval; the system should return chunks from each disagreeing source.
Tests extraction-driven retrieval; case number is a known structured field.

queries.text: What is the address of the property?
Are there illegible or unclear sections in any document?
queries.notes: Should surface chunks from pages flagged as low-confidence in their manifest.
